  if (boundary.nodeType) {
    attrsValue = { "stroke-width": 1 };

  let rectData = {

  let boundaryConf = conf2.boundaryFont();

  _drawTextCandidateFunc(conf2)(
    boundary.label.text,

    boundary.y + boundary.label.Y,

    boundary.height,

    boundaryConf

    boundaryConf = conf2.boundaryFont();
    boundaryConf.fontColor = fontColor;
    _drawTextCandidateFunc(conf2)(
      boundary.type.text,
      boundaryElem,
      boundary.x,
      boundary.y + boundary.type.Y,
      boundary.width,
      boundary.height,
      { fill: "#444444" },
      boundaryConf
    );
  }

    boundaryConf = conf2.boundaryFont();
    boundaryConf.fontSize = boundaryConf.fontSize - 2;
    boundaryConf.fontColor = fontColor;

      boundary.descr.text,
      boundaryElem,
      boundary.x,
      boundary.y + boundary.descr.Y,
      boundary.width,
      boundary.height,
      { fill: "#444444" },
      boundaryConf
    );
